case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.) N.A. VS. ROBERTO GUERRERO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
